markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, feedback, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Accuracy:** Recent drafts misaligned with Navan's value prop, prompting a new artifact to guide content toward key differentiators (e.g., dynamic policies) and specific CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [**Prioritization Framework:** The content refresh strategy will shift from a purely SEO-driven model to a business-value-driven one, combining SEO metrics with lead-gen data and business impact.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [**Internal Linking:** A new process will use a priority URL list from GSC, provided by Moran, to boost key pages and ensure consistent, strategic linking.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [**Legal Review:** Navan will clarify its legal review process, which requires external substantiation for claims, to inform a new artifact that flags content for review.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

## Topics

### Content Accuracy & Value Prop

  - [**Problem:** Recent drafts (e.g., "Guide to Construction Travel Management") misaligned with Navan's value prop, promoting generic solutions instead of key differentiators like dynamic policies.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create a new artifact for the content generation pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Guide content toward Navan's specific value prop and ensure each piece has a clear CTA (demo, asset download) to drive leads, not just traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
      - [**Owner:** Aida will draft a framework this week.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

### Content Prioritization Framework

  - [**Problem:** The current Airtable refresh prioritization is purely SEO-driven (traffic/position), lacking business context.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [**Solution:** Develop a new framework combining:](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
      - [**SEO Metrics:** Traffic, position, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Business Impact:** Lead generation data and relevance to strategic goals.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [**Owner:** Aida will draft a framework this week for review.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

### Internal Linking Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Current internal linking is ad-hoc, missing a strategic, consistent approach.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [**Solution:** Implement a new process using a priority URL list from GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
      - [**Owner:** Moran will provide the initial list and anchor text.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
      - [**Process:** The list will be reviewed quarterly.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Guideline:** Aim for 8–10 links per article, avoiding link-dense paragraphs.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### Legal Review Process

  - [**Context:** Navan's legal team reviews all blogs, requiring external substantiation for claims (e.g., "top choice" status).](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [**Solution:** Navan will clarify legal guidelines to inform a new artifact that flags content for review, similar to a process used for a healthcare client.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [**Owner:** Libby/Rich will get guidance from the legal team and share it with Aida.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

### Tone & Personality

  - [**Problem:** Content feels too "straightforward" and lacks personality.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [**Solution:** Use Rich's feedback on drafts to refine writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Contingency:** If a single guideline proves ineffective, Aida proposed a separate artifact to add tone at the draft stage without sacrificing informational quality.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Moran:** Provide the priority URL and anchor text list for internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**Aida:** Draft frameworks for the new value prop and prioritization artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [**Libby/Rich:**](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
      - [Clarify legal review guidelines and share with Aida.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [Provide detailed feedback on drafts, highlighting tone and accuracy issues.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
      - [Finalize the "Calibration Refresh" article for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/127XFdgk25aTjzsdJDsFuVZMoSEXM4so?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
